name: Carnage Cross
short_description: Start your engines in the vehicular combat game Carnage Cross, with eight playable drivers, levels, and an arsenal of weapons, specials and rogue-like abilities at your disposal in story, skirmish, or online modes, your hi-octane skills will uncover the secret conspiracies in Carnage Cross!
detailed_description:
Carnage Cross is a vehicular death match game with eight playable drivers, levels, and an arsenal of weapons, specials, opponents and roguelike abilities at your disposal. Play the first episode, "Leo's Report", or pick and choose the driver and maps you want to play in singleplayer or online multiplayer.

Playable Carnage Cross: Episode 1, "Leo's Report" - a singleplayer story mode about one driver and his crusade for righteous fury, includes battle mode with six drivers and specials, six maps, and over 15 different pick-ups and rogue-like abilities.
